archive.title: Restricted Archives
archive.description: Only fragments have survived. Every dossier contains evidence recovered from inside MathVilla.
archive.warning: These files are partially decrypted. Accessing them may reveal unstable records.

dossiers.title: The First Breach
dossiers.summary: Ansh ignored the warning and crossed the forbidden doorway.
dossiers.imageAlt: Recovered dossier showing the first breach

dossiers.title: The System Lag
dossiers.summary: The Architect discovers that impossible variables have entered the system.
dossiers.imageAlt: Recovered dossier recording the MathVilla system lag

dossiers.title: The Purple Orb
dossiers.summary: An unknown energy source. Origin and purpose remain classified.
dossiers.imageAlt: Recovered dossier about the mysterious purple orb

dossiers.title: Ganith
dossiers.summary: A paradox entity carrying the orb. All records remain encrypted.

dossiers.title: The Architect
dossiers.summary: The mind behind MathVilla and the system built to control it.

dossiers.title: Unknown Dossier
dossiers.summary: Clearance rejected. This identity has been removed from the archive.
